content.title: Uday Varmora - DevOps / Cloud Engineer Resume
content.summary: DevOps / Cloud Engineer with **1+ year** building **scalable platform solutions, CI/CD systems, and proactive monitoring stacks** for cloud-native fintech infrastructure. Sustained **99.9% uptime SLAs**, eliminated **~70% operational toil**, and optimized release cycles across **20+ microservices** on **AWS EKS**. Hands-on with **Jenkins, ArgoCD, Terraform, Kubernetes, Python/Bash**, and **end-to-end platform ownership**.
skills: Jenkins, GitLab CI/CD, GitHub Actions, AWS CodePipeline, AWS CodeBuild, ArgoCD, Git workflows, design/code reviews
Docker, Kubernetes (EKS, OpenShift), Helm, Karpenter, KEDA, Ingress-NGINX
Terraform (34 reusable modules, S3 remote state, DynamoDB locking), AWS CloudFormation, SAM
AWS — EKS, EC2, Lambda, S3, ECR, RDS, VPC, CloudWatch; Azure (Fundamentals)
Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, Grafana Alloy, CloudWatch, proactive monitoring stack
HashiCorp Vault, AWS Secrets Manager, Sealed Secrets, Trivy Operator, IAM least-privilege, IRSA, Pod Identity
Python, Bash/Shell, Linux (Ubuntu, Amazon Linux, RHEL), System Administration
VPC, multi-AZ deployments, multi-region DR, ingress controllers, load balancing

bullets: Sustained **99.9% production uptime availability** across multi-AZ Kubernetes environments by **refining the monitoring stack to be more proactive**, utilizing **Prometheus, Grafana, and Loki** to detect system degradations prior to customer impact.

Worked with application squads to **optimize internal CI/CD systems**, eliminating **~70% of operational toil** through **Python/Bash automation** while actively participating in **design and code reviews** to guarantee platform delivery quality.

Owned and maintained a secure, multi-environment **Infrastructure as Code (IaC) codebase** utilizing **34 reusable Terraform modules**, reducing manual ecosystem provisioning times by **80%** and eliminating configuration drift by **95%**.

Drove **incident response** and **root-cause analysis** for **Linux-based production incidents** across CPU, memory, network, and container runtime; authored **blameless post-mortems and runbooks** that reduced repeat-incident frequency and accelerated on-call response readiness.

Operated **Kubernetes (EKS, OpenShift)** clusters with **ArgoCD GitOps, Helm, and Ingress-NGINX Controller** — managing zero-downtime rollouts, **Karpenter Spot/On-Demand diversification**, and **KEDA event-driven scaling**; preserved availability while reducing compute costs by **30% ($500+/month)**.

Built and maintained AWS infrastructure monitoring on **Linux-based environments**, configured CloudWatch dashboards, and triaged production incidents across Kubernetes workloads; authored operational runbooks for recurring issue patterns and root-cause analyses.

Wrote **Python and Bash** automation scripts to streamline deployment workflows and reduce manual operational steps — demonstrated ownership and impact, earning **full-time promotion within 5 months**.

projects.title: Cloud-Native SaaS CRM Platform — Multi-Tenant AWS / EKS Build & Deploy Infrastructure
projects.tech: Terraform · AWS EKS · Docker · Jenkins · GitLab CI/CD · GitHub Actions · AWS CodePipeline · ArgoCD · Ingress-NGINX · Prometheus · Grafana
bullets: Designed multi-environment build/deploy architecture with per-environment **VPC isolation and S3/DynamoDB remote state** — enabling reproducible Dev/Production infrastructure on Linux-based EKS nodes with **Ingress-NGINX Controller区分**; executed zero-downtime **EKS cluster upgrade (v1.33 → v1.34)** managing node group rollouts, add-on compatibility, and API deprecation remediation.

Reduced compute costs by **30% ($500+/month)** via Karpenter Spot/On-Demand diversification and KEDA off-hours scale-down; migrated deprecated loki-stack to Loki + Grafana Alloy, eliminating deprecated chart dependencies and improving log pipeline reliability.

Built multi-region **disaster recovery strategy** using Velero (with EBS snapshot Data Mover), S3/ECR cross-region replication, and AWS Backup with cross-region vaults — achieving **RPO < 1 hour** for production workloads.

projects.title: Serverless Backend — Multi-Tenant Salon Management SaaS
projects.tech: AWS Lambda · SAM · CloudFormation · API Gateway · RDS PostgreSQL · Amazon EFS · Secrets Manager · Python
bullets: Architected a serverless build/deploy system using **6 nested SAM/CloudFormation templates** with SAM build pipelines — enabling independent deployment of **30+ Python Lambda functions** with reproducible packaging and per-function least-privilege IAM.
Solved Lambda layer size constraints by engineering a shared **EFS-mounted Python dependency layer** across 30+ functions — eliminating packaging bottlenecks and cutting build times by **60%+**.

projects.title: Healthcare Management System — Cloud Infrastructure & CI/CD
projects.tech: AWS S3 · CloudFront · App Runner · ECR · Docker · GitHub Actions · Secrets Manager · IAM
bullets: Engineered split-hosting (S3/CloudFront frontend, Dockerised App Runner backend) with a **dual-registry GHCR/ECR strategy** — enabling zero-downtime redeployments and **~30% reduced image pull latency** while serving 500+ concurrent users.

Automated full release workflow via **GitHub Actions** — Docker build, ECR/GHCR dual-push, S3 sync, CloudFront invalidation, and App Runner deploy; applied least-privilege IAM scoping that removed 5+ overly permissive roles.

education.left: **B.Tech, Information Technology** — Dharmsinh Desai University, Gujarat, India  |  CGPA: 7.25 / 10

achievements: Awarded **“Student of the Year”** in Class 10 for outstanding academic performance and leadership contributions.

jd:
About super.money
We're super.money, an Indian fintech startup backed by Flipkart, here to redefine how money works.super.money isn't just another UPI app; it is India's most rewarding UPI platform, a daily money hack. Whether one is booking a flight, grabbing coffee, or splitting bills with friends, they get rewarded every time they spend. super.money offers instant cashback, flight rewards, and credit that actually works for users. It's built for speed, packed with perks, and made for the way Gen Z moves - fast, smart, and always on. Whether it's payments, loans, credit cards, or just helping someone survive the month, super.money can do it all.

Job Description
Function: IT Operations and Support → DevOps / Cloud

CI / CDCloud ComputingDevOpsMonitoring+6 moreReliability EngineeringAWSAzureGoogle Cloud (GCP)JenkinsTerraform
We are looking for world-class talent who can help us accelerate this journey and be part of a core team that is just getting started.



Responsibilities:

Own and build scalable platform solutions that will be used by the complete organization.
Work with app teams to optimize our CI/CD systems.
Refine our monitoring stack to be more proactive.
Actively participate in design and code reviews to ensure the quality of solutions.


Requirements:

B. E. /B. Tech or any other similar qualification with experience in the below technology stack.
Experience with Continuous Integration / Continuous Delivery (CI/CD) tools (e. g., Argo, Git, Jenkins).
Familiarity with Infrastructure as Code frameworks like Terraform.
A good grasp of cloud services offered by providers like GCP, AWS or Azure.
Experience with container orchestration with Kubernetes and docker.
Preliminary knowledge of networking concepts.


Good to have:

Experience in maintaining an IAC codebase.
Experience with any observability stack.
Experience in a fintech or similar organization.
Ability to own things end to end and operate under minimal supervision.

Benefits at super.money
Free pantry
